coastal.title: Fraser Canyon wildfires continue to threaten residents, property
coastal.description: The Ainslie Creek fire is now estimated to be more than 15,500 hectares in size, and the Brunswick Creek fire across the river is now at an estimated 2,600 hectares.

coastal.title: Truck brings down power lines, starts small brush fire on Malahat
coastal.description: The incident occurred at approximately 3:40 p.m. on July 9. Shawnigan Lake RCMP responded to the area of South Shawnigan Lake Road and the Trans-Canada Highway.

all.title: WATCH: Global Okanagan News at 5:30 p.m. – July 9
all.description: Watch the online news edition of Global Okanagan at 5:30 p.m.
